Uses of Package
nonprofitbookkeeping.exception

Packages that use nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.api
Public API surface for embedding or integrating NonprofitBookkeeping.
nonprofitbookkeeping.core
 
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
 
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
 
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
 
  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.exception used by nonprofitbookkeeping.api
    Class
    Description
    ActionCancelledException
    Exception thrown when an action is cancelled by the user, for example, by closing a file dialog without selecting a file.
    NoFileCreatedException
    Exception thrown when an operation that is expected to create a file fails to do so.

    Class
    Description
    ActionCancelledException
    Exception thrown when an action is cancelled by the user, for example, by closing a file dialog without selecting a file.
    NoFileCreatedException
    Exception thrown when an operation that is expected to create a file fails to do so.

    Exception thrown when an action is cancelled by the user, for example, by closing a file dialog without selecting a file.

  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.exception used by nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
    Class
    Description
    ActionCancelledException
    Exception thrown when an action is cancelled by the user, for example, by closing a file dialog without selecting a file.
    NoFileCreatedException
    Exception thrown when an operation that is expected to create a file fails to do so.
    NoFileException
    Thrown when no file is available.
